steps.title: Identify the formula needed
steps.content: To find mass, use mass = density × volume. We know density = 0.375 g/cm³, so we must calculate the volume first.

steps.title: Calculate the cube's volume
steps.content: For a cube with edge length 4.000 cm: $$V = (4.000)^3 = 64.000 \text{ cm}^3$$

steps.title: Calculate the mass
steps.content:
Apply the mass formula: $$\text{mass} = 0.375 \text{ g/cm}^3 \times 64.000 \text{ cm}^3 = 24.00 \text{ grams}$$
Equivalent forms accepted: 24.00, 24.000.
